- Even if Player RED might offer more later, the immediate $1 gain is better than risking rejection and certain loss

- The risk-free nature of acceptance (Proposal A)
- The "something from nothing" framing (Proposal B)
- The payoff maximization perspective (all proposals)

This makes acceptance not just optimal, but the only rational choice in this game structure.

</reason>
